response.justification: Nearly two decades of fullstack experience with strong recent alignment: TypeScript/Node.js/React/MongoDB in production, AWS and Kubernetes exposure, and current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work directly matching the role's AI agent requirement. Deep testing culture (TDD, test-framework authorship, testing workshops) fits the quality focus. Main gaps are no stated Nest.js or Kotlin experience and significant career time in D, a stack outside the role's needs.
strengths: Extensive fullstack TypeScript/Node.js/React experience across multiple companies
Current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP development experience
Strong testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, test tooling author)
concerns: No Kotlin and limited recent Java exposure
Considerable career investment in D, a niche stack not relevant to the role
